    153/303 clusters guaranteed (duration >= 5 min), 150 at risk but probabilistically caught within 5-min window.

      Step 4 measured: 248 preserved, 55 lost (82% preservation)
    Why not 30 min? Preservation drops to 63% (111 clusters lost), below the 70% threshold.

  Calculation Analytics: 60 min
    Cluster preservation: 60% (threshold: >= 50%).

    Cluster breakdown at 60 min:
